skipped.message: Reason: distribution initializes with short validation error ('test-examples.R:145:9')

testcase.name: example_tm_tbl_listing.Rd

failure.message: Expected `pkgload::run_example(...)` not to throw any errors. ('test-examples.R:155:7')

testcase.failure: Expected `pkgload::run_example(...)` not to throw any errors. Actually got a <simpleError> with message: could not find function "tm_tbl_listing" Backtrace: ▆ 1. ├─teal.modules.general (local) with_mocked_app_bindings(...) at test-examples.R:155:7 2. │ ├─testthat::with_mocked_bindings(...) at test-examples.R:121:3 3. │ └─testthat::with_mocked_bindings(...) at test-examples.R:121:3 4. ├─teal.modules.general (local) suppress_warnings(...) at test-examples.R:121:3 5. │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(...) at test-examples.R:24:3 6. └─testthat::expect_no_error(...)

testcase.name: tm_gtsummary_module_server_behavior_server_function_generates_table_with_include_being_NULL
testcase.error: <shiny.silent.error/validation/error/condition> Error: Variables to stratify with and variables to include should be different Backtrace: ▆ 1. ├─shiny::testServer(...) at test-tm_gtsummary.R:270:5 2. │ ├─shiny:::withMockContext(...) 3. │ │ ├─shiny::isolate(...) 4. │ │ │ ├─shiny::..stacktraceoff..(...) 5. │ │ │ └─ctx$run(...) 6. │ │ │ ├─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 7. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 8. │ │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 9. │ │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 10. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 11. │ │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 12. │ │ │ ├─shiny:::with_otel_span_context(...) 13. │ │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 14. │ │ │ ├─shiny::captureStackTraces(...) 15. │ │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 16. │ │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 17. │ │ │ │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(expr, error = doCaptureStack) 18. │ │ │ └─env$runWith(self, func) 19. │ │ │ └─shiny (local) contextFunc() 20. │ │ │ └─shiny::..stacktraceon..(expr) 21. │ │ ├─shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 22. │ │ │ └─promises::with_promise_domain(...) 23. │ │ │ └─domain$wrapSync(expr) 24. │ │ │ └─base::force(expr) 25. │ │ └─withr::with_options(...) 26. │ │ └─base::force(code) 27. │ └─rlang::eval_tidy(quosure, mask, rlang::caller_env()) 28. ├─testthat::expect_true(...) at test-tm_gtsummary.R:283:9 29. │ └─testthat::quasi_label(enquo(object), label) 30. │ └─rlang::eval_bare(expr, quo_get_env(quo)) 31. ├─base::endsWith(get_code(session$returned()), "table") 32. ├─teal.code::get_code(session$returned()) 33. │ └─teal.code::dev_suppress(object) 34. │ └─base::force(x) 35. ├─session$returned() 36. │ └─base::stop(.value) 37. └─shiny (local) `<fn>`(`<shny.sl.>`)
